excludes: positive merge shepherd and GitHub checks
positive dashboard/API and monitor snapshot assembly

scenarios.summary: Strict workflow validation proves agent-owned lifecycle config, repo-local tools, marker correlation, and context/validation budget parsing.

evidence.testName: strictly gates production agent-owned lifecycle mode
keeps root and base template workflows as strict agent-owned defaults
parses context and validation budget controls

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/workflow.test.ts -t "strictly gates production agent-owned lifecycle mode|keeps root and base template workflows as strict agent-owned defaults|parses context and validation budget controls" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Core scheduler access to tracker state stays behind the reader boundary and direct tracker mutations are rejected by architecture proof.

evidence.testName: reports direct tracker writes and raw tracker mutations in core scheduler code

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/check-scripts.test.ts -t "reports direct tracker writes and raw tracker mutations in core scheduler code" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Workspace creation, hooks, locks, bootstrap markers, and partial-bootstrap recovery are proven without live credentials.
The Codex App Server runner boundary is exercised through local fake protocol fixtures, including success, early exit, and nested-orchestrator stops.

evidence.testName: runs a thread and waits for turn completion
fails promptly when the app server exits before turn completion
stops nested orchestrator commands inside agent turns

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/runner.test.ts -t "runs a thread and waits for turn completion|fails promptly when the app server exits before turn completion|stops nested orchestrator commands inside agent turns" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Eligible dispatch, retry attempts, durable restart recovery, unchanged-success suppression, and retry-budget safety writes are source-core proof.

evidence.testName: dispatches eligible issues to a runner
passes retry attempts and does not re-dispatch an unchanged successful issue
rebuilds due retries from durable runtime state after restart
routes retry budget exhaustion through scheduler safety lifecycle events

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/orchestrator.test.ts -t "dispatches eligible issues to a runner|passes retry attempts and does not re-dispatch an unchanged successful issue|rebuilds due retries from durable runtime state after restart|routes retry budget exhaustion through scheduler safety lifecycle events" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Handoffs are reviewable only with valid Validation-JSON evidence, matching head/profile data, and allowed PR metadata.

evidence.testName: accepts fresh matching JSON evidence
rejects handoffs with invalid validation evidence before tracker writes or issue-state persistence

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/validation.test.ts tests/agent-lifecycle.test.ts -t "accepts fresh matching JSON evidence|rejects handoffs with invalid validation evidence before tracker writes or issue-state persistence" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Agent-owned lifecycle markers and tracker evidence must correlate issue, run, and attempt before completion.

evidence.testName: records passed agent-owned evidence before completing the run
correlates agent-owned lifecycle comments with issue, run, and attempt markers
correlates agent-owned PR metadata and handoff comments with run and attempt

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/agent-owned-lifecycle-evidence.test.ts tests/agent-lifecycle.test.ts -t "records passed agent-owned evidence before completing the run|correlates agent-owned lifecycle comments with issue, run, and attempt markers|correlates agent-owned PR metadata and handoff comments with run and attempt" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Source-core completion and disabled extension configuration stay silent: no reviewer/fixer prompts, merge shepherd, monitor server/control API, model override application, or child-issue writer exposure.

evidence.testName: does not build reviewer or fixer prompts when review is disabled
does not run the merge shepherd when github.merge_mode is manual
does not start the monitor server or control API when the monitor is disabled
keeps report-only model routing from applying a model override
keeps planning-disabled guardrails from exposing a child-issue writer
uses no-op post-validation extension path for source-core runs
uses no-op merge-state extension path for source-core runs

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/orchestrator.test.ts -t "uses no-op post-validation extension path for source-core runs|uses no-op merge-state extension path for source-core runs" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Oversized implementation prompts stop before runner invocation and record context-budget diagnostics.

evidence.testName: records prompt size and large-section reasons for context budget diagnostics
stops before a runner call when the implementation prompt exceeds the context budget

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/context-pack.test.ts tests/orchestrator.test.ts -t "records prompt size and large-section reasons for context budget diagnostics|stops before a runner call when the implementation prompt exceeds the context budget" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Full-suite validation evidence is budgeted per unchanged head and reuse requires a matching validation profile.

evidence.testName: flags duplicate full validation runs for the same evidence head
reuses previous-run validation evidence when repoHead matches the current code
rejects reused validation evidence when the workflow config or risk profile changed

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/validation.test.ts tests/workflow.test.ts -t "flags duplicate full validation runs for the same evidence head|reuses previous-run validation evidence when repoHead matches the current code|rejects reused validation evidence when the workflow config or risk profile changed|parses context and validation budget controls" --reporter verbose

scenarios.summary: Scheduler-owned writes are limited to enumerated no-agent-can-act safety reasons and bookkeeping-only comments.

evidence.testName: allows enumerated scheduler safety writes in agent-owned mode and logs the safety reason
rejects scheduler safety writes without an allowed reason or with substantive content
routes retry budget exhaustion through scheduler safety lifecycle events

proofCommands: npm test -- tests/lifecycle-controller.test.ts tests/orchestrator.test.ts -t "allows enumerated scheduler safety writes in agent-owned mode and logs the safety reason|rejects scheduler safety writes without an allowed reason or with substantive content|routes retry budget exhaustion through scheduler safety lifecycle events" --reporter verbose
